_comment: CI performance regression thresholds (Phase 32). p95 values in milliseconds, derived from the local 25-user / 60s baseline captured 2026-05-17 + 20% headroom over the measured number. The CI perf-regression job fails when an endpoint's measured p95 exceeds threshold * 1.20 (effectively 1.44x of the original measurement). Endpoints absent from this map are skipped by the regression checker (they're advisory). The production-scale baseline (50 users * 5min) is captured on the CI's dedicated runner and lives in PERFORMANCE.md under 'Load Test Baseline'. When intentional regressions are accepted, bump the threshold in the same PR and cite the justification.
